title: Add --include-volumes flag to 'podman commit'
body:
The 'docker commit' will never include a container's volumes when committing, without an explicit request through '--change'.

Podman, however, defaulted to including user volumes as image volumes.

Make this behavior depend on a new flag, '--include-volumes', and make the default behavior match Docker.
